For example, the liver produces [protein] that helps muscles function properly. It also helps in the breakdown of [fats] and [carbohydrates], which are essential for energy in the muscular system. The liver also produces [enzyme] that aids in the digestion of [food], which is necessary for muscle energy. Additionally, the liver helps in the detoxification of [toxins], which can affect muscle health. The liver also produces [hormone] that influences muscle growth and repair. Finally, the liver supports the muscular system by providing [nutrients] that muscles require to function effectively.
